text_snippet: Add ERC: Dive Log ### Description This PR introduces a draft ERC for a Dive Logbook Standard. This standard defines an interface (`IDiveLog`) for storing, retrieving, and cryptographically verifying dive log data on EVM-compatible blockchains. It specifies an append-only data schema derived from U.S
